sidebar.defaultDescription: Monitor data, operate users, and configure the LearnX platform.

descriptions.dashboard: The dashboard is connected to live admin data.
descriptions.teachers: Track instructor expertise, courses, and account status.
descriptions.students: Track progress and manage students across the system.
descriptions.courses: Edit, monitor, and review courses in the ecosystem.
descriptions.system: Control brand identity and security protocol settings.
descriptions.content: Manage blogs, FAQs, and communication banners for the platform.
